# Spacedeck Protocol Documentation

> The high-velocity Autonomous Settlement Protocol for the Solana Virtual Machine (SVM).

This file provides an index of key documentation for AI agents and developers, following the [llmstxt.org](https://llmstxt.org) standard.

## Core Integration Paths

- [Quickstart Guide](/README.md#-quickstart-svm-integration): Immediate integration pathways for Eliza, Zerebro, and SDK consumers.
- [Solana Program (Anchor)](/packages/contracts/anchor): Technical reference for the SVM settlement logic.
- [Python SDK](/packages/sdk-python/README.md): API reference for the Jito-enhanced Python harness.

## Core Concepts (SVM Native)

1.  **8-Step Kinetic Lifecycle**: Exhaustive end-to-end settlement manifest.
2.  **PDA Budget Delegation**: Programmatic authority delegation on Solana.
3.  **Jito Bundle Optimization**: MEV-protection for agentic intents.
4.  **ZK-Sanitized Intents**: Confidentiality layer via Arcium integration.

## Developer Resources

- [Institutional Stack](/README.md#-strategic-integration-stack): Technical coordination with Arcium, Near, and Jito.
- [API Endpoints](/README.md#api-endpoints): Deterministic interface for the Prism Orchestrator.

## Full Context
- [LLMS-full.txt](/llms-full.txt): Comprehensive aggregate of all documentation for deep model ingestion.
